elena.name: Elena Marchetti
elena.personaProfile: Direct but warm communicator. Protects the team's focus above all — hates context switching. Says no to anything that risks the Atlas deadline unless there is a written impact analysis. Prefers Slack messages under 5 lines, asks 'what happens if we don't?' before accepting new work. Softens refusals by proposing an alternative date. Values people who come with options, not problems.
